participants.name: Jalen Farmer
participants.notes: Combine numbers listed; tested very well at pro day per On3. 6-4 7/8 per 247Sports. Did not do bench or 3-cone at combine; may have tested at pro day but specific pro day numbers not separately reported. Former Florida transfer, declared early. Senior Bowl participant.

participants.name: Jager Burton
participants.notes: Combine 40 was 4.94; sat on that at pro day. Pro day vertical (30.5) and broad (9'7" = 115") improved over combine marks (28" vert, 111" broad). Bench (28 reps) and shuttle (4.45) were new pro day results not done at combine. Per EssentiallySports/Galko and PFF tracker.

participants.name: Joshua Braun
participants.notes: Combine numbers: 7.62 3-cone, 101" broad, 22 bench. Did not run 40, vertical, or shuttle at combine per On3. May have tested additional drills at pro day but specific pro day results not separately reported. Transfer from Florida/Arkansas.

participants.name: Seth McGowan
participants.notes: Combine numbers: 4.49 40, 42.5" vertical (2nd-best RB all-time at combine), 131" broad (best among RBs). Had poor shuttle at combine per On3. Pro day was expected to improve agility scores but specific pro day numbers not separately reported. Transfer from Oklahoma/NMSU.

participants.name: Kendrick Law
participants.notes: Combine 40 was 4.45, vertical 42", broad 128". Did NOT compete in field work at combine per On3 — only measured and did some drills. Got a ton of work at pro day including RB drills. Agility testing at pro day was key focus but specific pro day agility numbers not reported. Former Alabama transfer.

participants.name: David Gusta
participants.notes: Combine: 4.88 40 (per Yahoo/NFL.com), 37 bench reps, elite 1.68 10-yard split, strong vertical per On3. 9.75 RAS. Washington State transfer. Specific pro day results not separately reported.

participants.name: Kam Olds
participants.notes: Listed on PFF pro day tracker (Big Board Rank 431). No specific testing numbers found from pro day.

participants.name: Zach Calzada
participants.notes: Listed on PFF pro day tracker (Big Board Rank 434). Per On3, shed a ton of weight since end of season and looked in much better shape. Incarnate Word transfer who started at QB for Kentucky in 2025. Threw to receivers at pro day.

participants.name: Ja'Mori Maclin
participants.notes: Listed on PFF pro day tracker (Big Board Rank 435). Former North Texas transfer. No specific testing numbers found from pro day.

additional_notes: Kentucky's 2026 Pro Day was held Tuesday, March 11, 2026 at the Nutter Field House in Lexington, KY at 11 AM ET. 30 NFL teams were in attendance per On3. Indoor facility. The PFF tracker (sourced from Eric Galko) confirmed the key participants and provided specific testing results only for Jager Burton (vertical 30.5", broad 9'7", shuttle 4.45, bench 28 reps). The On3 recap confirmed Burton's shuttle and broad jump results and noted Kendrick Law was the most popular player at the event. Josh Kattus (TE, knee surgery) and Jordan Lovett (S, knee injury from November) did NOT participate. Several participants had combine numbers on record; pro day was used to fill gaps or improve on combine marks. Specific individual drill results beyond Burton's were not separately reported from pro day in available sources — combine numbers are included where applicable for context. Buffalo Bills RB Ray Davis and former Bucs/Lions OL Logan Stenberg were on-site as roaming reporters. Additional participants beyond PFF's tracked list may have been present but were not reported in available sources. The timing method for pro day results was not specified in any source found.
